metric_semantics.final_delta_abs: Absolute ground-state energy error at the matched-family replay endpoint after ADAPT.
metric_semantics.patch_count_2q: Two-qubit gate count from fixed-patch transpile snapshots on one shared patch panel.
metric_semantics.patch_depth: Depth from fixed-patch transpile snapshots on one shared patch panel.
metric_semantics.measurement_basis_group_count: Number of single-basis measurement groups for the mapped Hamiltonian observable on each selected patch.
metric_semantics.measurement_estimated_total_shots: basis_group_count × measurement_shots_per_group; mitigation overhead excluded by design.
metric_semantics.adapt_measurement_proxy: Arm-level grouped-reuse proxy accumulated across the full ADAPT search, including discarded beam branches; reported once per arm aggregate.
metric_semantics.pareto_front: Nondominated arm aggregates under simultaneous minimization of (final_delta_abs, patch_count_2q_mean, patch_depth_mean).
